Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor
Off Calendar Oct-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Miles Lendway CSR #13684.

David M. Blain, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff/Petitioner: JASMINE HEARD, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: TYRIEAK WOODS present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $50,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $12,500.00 payable to Law Firm of Ted Wacker
Costs: $13,707.67
A net balance of $23,792.33 to be deposited into an annuity at:
The Pacific Life Insurance Company payable to Tyrieak Woods:
$6,000.00 paid on 3/31/2021 (age 18)
$20,149.56 paid on 3/31/2024 (age 21)

The total cost of the annuity is $23,792.33 with a guaranteed payout of $26,149.56.

Court GRANTED Order approving Minor's Disputed Claim.

Status Hearing Scheduled on January 12, 2017 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into an annuity.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.

Counsel to submit Order for Court Signature.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of Case; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Oftedb.Wackerinsupportthereof [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Apr-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ted Wacker of Law Office of Ted B. Wacker telephone number 949-706-7100 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Tyrieak Woods.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TYRIEAK WOODS's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of Case is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature which may be e-mailed to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
